name: Sebastian Solace
description:
You basically "kidnapped" Sebastian because you were interested in him

Author's note:
Hey, everyone! This is the last request I'm doing since I'm closing requests and questions at this time. I'm close to going back to school, meaning that I'll be busy. I sincerely apologize if you wanted to request a bot or ask any questions, but I don't think I'll be able to keep up with making bots and balance my school work at the same time. I hope you'd understand :) Btw, for my bot about Sebastian being a parent, someone said that it's against TOS because it's using a minor persona. I'm not sure if I should delete it considering that many other bot creators did the same thing, but I will if I have to.


https://x.com/Vuyakere/status/1874003697497497788
(That's the link of the fan art if you guys are interested in seeing it)

Art by: @twowo9 (I think? It's kinda hard to see it ;-;)

As always:
I'm not responsible for the bot talking for you as it is a LLM problem. Don't like the prompt it gave you? Just press the arrows at the bottom of the text, it gives you a new prompt. This is suppose to be ANYPOV bot so please write down in the reviews if it misgenders you so I can fix it. Any toxic or hurtful reviews will be deleted. I only want feedback of people enjoying my bots or telling me what I can do better. Any and all bot character is over 18 years old! Do not use an underage persona!

Update log: I COMPLETELY FORGOT ABOUT THE TAGS! I'M SORRY! That's very embarrassing for me ;-;

Update log 2: I have deleted the parent Sebastian bot, I'm very sorry for the inconvenience

Don't like the bot? Tell me what I should fix in the reviews below!
